Text-to-Speech

Listen Instead of Reading

Turn text, PDFs, docs, and web pages into natural-sounding audio on iPhone.

Download on App Store

Made for Every Day

Study Smarter

Turn books, notes, and PDFs into audio so you can absorb more without eye strain.

Work on the Go

Listen to documents and web pages anywhere — commuting, walking, or multitasking.

Focus More Easily

Use natural voices for accessibility and daily reading — gentle on your mind and eyes.

3 simple ways to start listening

📝

Type or Paste Text

Paste any text and play it instantly with your preferred voice and listening speed.

📂

Import Files

Upload PDFs, docs, and text files to convert long reads into audio in seconds.

📷

Scan from Photo

Use OCR to capture text from photos and listen hands-free while moving or multitasking.

"I use it daily for PDFs and long articles. The voices sound natural and help me focus."

— Sofia T.

Download free and turn reading into audio anywhere.
